log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Goblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:2+9=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Goblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Goblin — Bardic Musician.
→ Goblin — Bardic Musician healed for 7 HP. HP: 40/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 28 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 12/67
→ Goblin — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 7 vs DC 14]
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
